title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCVI. Lullabies.
content:
Bye, baby bunting,
        Daddy's gone a hunting,
        To get a little hare's skin
        To wrap a baby bunting in.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCVI. Lullabies." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
